channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Funeral held for two Lebanese paramedics killed in Israeli attack
item.description: Hundreds of mourners gathered for the funeral of two Lebanese paramedics killed by an Israeli strike

item.title: As Trump readies to meet Xi, experts say he is ‘desperate for a win’
item.description: Trade between the two countries has suffered since Trump came into office even as China's exports have hit new highs.

item.title: Philip Davis and Progressive Liberal Party win general election in Bahamas
item.description: The victory marks the first time in three decades a Bahamian political party has noticed back-to-back election wins.

item.title: Why Louisiana paused its US House primary election amid redistricting push
item.description: Louisiana governor suspends vote following Supreme Court ruling; critics say move sows confusion and violates law.

item.title: Crowds gather in Tehran to send off Iran’s World Cup team
item.description: Huge crowds gathered in Tehran’s Revolution Square to celebrate and send off Iran’s national football team.

item.title: US waives visa bonds of up to $15,000 for FIFA World Cup ticket holders
item.description: Trump administration's visa bond programme had raised concerns about soaring costs for World Cup travellers to US.

item.title: Five things you may not know about US-China ties
item.description: Al Jazeera’s @avawarrinerr explains five things you may not know about the ties connecting China and the US.

item.title: Republicans break ranks, but Senate fails to curb Trump’s Iran war powers
item.description: The bill falls short, but vote shows cracks are growing in the Republican support for the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Russia unleashes massive drone barrage on Ukraine killing six
item.description: Russia has launched a massive daytime drone barrage across Ukraine, killing at least six people.

item.title: New eye scan detects diseases years before symptoms appear
item.description: A Qatar-based professor has pioneered a non-invasive eye scan to detect neurodegenerative diseases in minutes.

item.title: Will the boycott of Eurovision have any impact?
item.description: The decision by five nations to boycott the song contest comes amid Israel's genocide in Gaza.

item.title: Hamas must disarm, not ‘disappear’ from Gaza: Board of Peace’s Mladenov
item.description: 'We are not asking Hamas to disappear as a political movement’, says diplomat overseeing the US-brokered truce in Gaza.

item.title: UAE denies Netanyahu visited in ‘secret’ during US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: The Gulf country says its ties with Israel 'are not based on secrecy or clandestine arrangements'.

item.title: There’s an app for that: Gaza’s developers use tech to solve war problems
item.description: Gaza’s battered tech sector is being reshaped by young developers building practical apps to navigate life.

item.title: Mexico’s Claudia Sheinbaum denies reports of CIA operations against cartels
item.description: Sheinbaum has called reports from CNN and The New York Times a 'lie' as questions grow about US involvement in Mexico.

item.title: Kevin Warsh confirmed as new US Federal Reserve chair amid controversy
item.description: Senate confirms Trump pick Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair amid growing concerns over independence.

item.title: How US donor bodies were sold for Israeli military training
item.description: How donated cadavers from US universities ended up in Israeli military surgical training.

item.title: US Senator Cassidy’s vote to convict Trump looms over Louisiana primary
item.description: Cassidy voted to convict Trump during his 2021 impeachment, faces Trump-backed challenger in test of president's pull.

item.title: Drug overdose deaths drop in United States for third year in a row
item.description: Experts cite range of factors as overdose deaths drop to nearly 70,000 in 2025, a 14 percent decline over previous year.

item.title: Can Macron’s Kenya visit revive French influence in Africa?
item.description: France is facing deepening resentment in former African colonies where it once had political influence.

item.title: South Carolina court tosses murder conviction in Alex Murdaugh case
item.description: The state's high court ruled that Murdaugh was denied a fair trial due to comments from a court clerk suggesting guilt.

item.title: Pro-Palestine chants disrupt Israel Eurovision performance
item.description: Israel’s Eurovision performance was disrupted by loud pro-Palestine protests during the Vienna semi-final

item.title: Trump-Xi summit: China’s help in Iran may require US concessions
item.description: Analysts say China may seek changes in US policy towards Taiwan if it were to pressure Iran to reopen Hormuz.

item.title: Church leaders killed in latest ethnic violence in India’s Manipur
item.description: Protests were held after three church leaders were killed and three others injured in India’s Manipur state.

item.title: Russia places UK ex-Defence Minister Ben Wallace on wanted list
item.description: Wallace last year recommended helping Ukraine carry out a strike on the bridge linking Russia to annexed Crimea.
